languages.text: {n}Цифры и символы скачут перед глазами: с этого аппарата кто-то вел переговоры на множестве разных волн, но ни одна из этих частот вам не знакома.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Цифры и символы скачут перед глазами: с этого аппарата кто-то вел переговоры на множестве разных волн, но ни одна из этих частот вам не знакома.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Цифры и символы скачут перед глазами: с этого аппарата кто-то вел переговоры на множестве разных волн, но ни одна из этих частот вам не знакома.{/n}

{n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}
{n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数字与符号在你眼前跃动。有人在用这台设备在多个不同波段上进行通讯，但这些频道你一个都不认识。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}数字与符号在你眼前跃动。有人在用这台设备在多个不同波段上进行通讯，但这些频道你一个都不认识。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Des chiffres et des symboles dansent sous vos yeux : quelqu'un utilisait cet appareil pour communiquer sur de nombreuses ondes différentes, mais vous ne reconnaissez aucune des fréquences.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Des chiffres et des symboles dansent sous vos yeux : quelqu'un utilisait cet appareil pour communiquer sur de nombreuses ondes différentes, mais vous ne reconnaissez aucune des fréquences.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Sayılar ve semboller, gözlerinin önünde dans ediyor. Birisi bu cihazı farklı dalgalarda iletişim kurmak için kullanmış ancak bu frekansların hiçbiri sana tanıdık gelmiyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Sayılar ve semboller, gözlerinin önünde dans ediyor. Birisi bu cihazı farklı dalgalarda iletişim kurmak için kullanmış ancak bu frekansların hiçbiri sana tanıdık gelmiyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los números y los símbolos bailan ante tus ojos: alguien ha usado este dispositivo para comunicarse en todo un abanico de ondas, pero ninguna de las frecuencias te resulta familiar.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los números y los símbolos bailan ante tus ojos: alguien ha usado este dispositivo para comunicarse en todo un abanico de ondas, pero ninguna de las frecuencias te resulta familiar.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vor deinen Augen tanzen Zahlen und Symbole: Jemand hat dieses Gerät benutzt, um auf verschiedenen Wellenlängen zu kommunizieren, aber keine dieser Frequenzen ist dir vertraut.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vor deinen Augen tanzen Zahlen und Symbole: Jemand hat dieses Gerät benutzt, um auf verschiedenen Wellenlängen zu kommunizieren, aber keine dieser Frequenzen ist dir vertraut.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数字と記号が目の前で踊る。この装置は、様々な波長で通信に使われていたが、そのどれもあなたには馴染みがない。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Numbers and symbols dance before your eyes: someone was using this device to communicate on many different waves, but none of these frequencies is familiar to you.{/n}
